name: mk
description: Memory Kit - Persistent context and knowledge base for AI Agents

interface.shortDescription: Persistent context and knowledge base for AI Agents
interface.longDescription: Memory Kit is a memory management system for AI agents that allows them to store and retrieve information from past conversations and experiences. It uses a combination of vector embeddings and semantic search to find relevant information and provides a simple API for agents to interact with their memory.
defaultPrompt: Use Memory Kit to retrieve relevant context from past conversations.
Use Memory Kit to store key insights from this session.
